baseline_rows.thesis: Cyclical machinery quality with strong 20d/60d trend and earnings surprise support.
AI/search and cloud monetization evidence offsets short-window technical weakness.
Aerospace quality and strong momentum remain aligned with industrial leadership.
Defensive growth and GLP-1 leadership with resilient relative strength.
Copper beta and earnings surprise support, with high beta treated as a sizing risk.
Capital-markets leverage with trend support; near earnings window caps confidence.
Large-bank rebound with low realized sigma and positive short-window trend.
Energy quality proxy is positive but macro/technical mix keeps it monitor-only.
Defensive health care rebound remains a monitor because percentile is below investable.
Data-center REIT demand is balanced by rate sensitivity.
Quality bank exposure is constructive but below the investable percentile threshold.
AI accelerator theme remains relevant but short-window weakness keeps it monitor-only.
Payments quality with low beta; forecast is monitor-only.
Platform durability but weak short-window relative strength.

excluded.FDXF: fewer than 60 completed bars or technical status unavailable

lineage.sortino_downside_window: negative daily returns in trailing 30 trading days; minimum 3 negative observations; scaled by sqrt(21)
